hero.title: Excavation and foundation work handled with precision.
hero.copy: French drains, waterproofing, crack repair, pyrite removal, water service and iron bacteria solutions for residential properties.

intro.title: Clear diagnostics. Clean execution. Durable repairs.
intro.copy: FAB Excavation specializes in excavation, foundation waterproofing, construction renovation and drainage work across Laval and Greater Montreal. Whether you need a French drain, crack repair, pyrite removal or a custom excavation project, the team delivers careful work to high quality standards.

items.title: French drain
items.copy: High-quality installation or replacement to move water away from the foundation by gravity or pump.

items.title: Concrete crack repair
items.copy: Exterior crack repair and waterproofing methods adapted to the foundation and soil conditions.

items.title: Pyrite removal
items.copy: Removal of contaminated fill and slab replacement with DB-certified crushed stone.

items.title: Water supply
items.copy: Repair and replacement of underground water service lines from the home to the service box.

items.title: Iron bacteria
items.copy: Diagnosis and remediation planning for reddish deposits that can block drainage systems.

solution.title: A practical process from inspection to backfill.

steps.title: Inspect
steps.copy: Identify symptoms, soil and access constraints before proposing the repair path.

steps.title: Protect
steps.copy: Plan excavation around the property, utilities and landscaping with a clean work zone.

steps.title: Repair
steps.copy: Install, waterproof, backfill and leave the site ready for the next stage.

reviews.title: Clients mention diligence, clarity and follow-through.

items.quote: You delivered. Your team never gave up, and we appreciated their work ethic, smiles, politeness and customer service.
items.author: Martine and Jean-Guy

items.quote: The project was a successful renovation experience. Thank you for the remarkable service and hard work.
items.author: Anne-Marie

items.quote: FAB Excavation delivered the goods. Fabrice answers the phone, is pleasant, on time and understood the constraints of my project.
items.author: Pierre-Antoine

contact.title: Tell us what is happening around the foundation.
contact.copy: Share the symptoms, property location, and the best time to reach you. For urgent water infiltration, calling is the fastest route.

form.name: Name
form.note: A member of the team will review your request and follow up to schedule an inspection or estimate.
